name: How much is a typical hearing loss settlement in Utah mines?

mainEntity.name: How much is a typical hearing loss settlement in Utah mines?

acceptedAnswer.description: Varies $10k-$100k+ based on % loss (e.g., 20% binaural ~$20k-40k at avg wages).[2] Key factors: Impairment rating, wage, age; Kennecott cases higher from severe noise.[2] Get rated accurately, negotiate hard.[5] Attorney boosts via appeals.[1]
